docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER MEIS & ASSOCIATES HEARING SET FOR JUN-30-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
DECLARATION OF LINNEA N. WILLIS RE: REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE FILED BY RESPONDENT ROSE OF SHARON SENIOR HOME, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER MEIS & ASSOCIATES' PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS CONTINUED TO JULY 15, 2009 FOR FURTHER HEARING WITH OPPOSITION PAPERS DUE ON JULY 7, 2009 TO BE FILED AND SERVED TO THE MOVING PARTY AND COURTESY COPIES TO DEPARTMENT 301. REPLY IS DUE ON JULY 10, 2009, FILED AND SERVED AND COPIES TO DEPARTMENT 301. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: NICHOLE RODICH, CSR # 11604

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER MEIS & ASSOCIATES' PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. THE COURT IS NOT ADDRESSING THE ISSUE WHETHER OTHER PARTY CLAIMS MAY BE ARBITRATED. MR. MEIS IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
